prompt: Which of the following is a factor of x² + 2x − 48?

choices.rationale: Expanding this doesn't reproduce the trinomial; its root isn't a solution.
Expanding this doesn't reproduce the trinomial; its root isn't a solution.
Correct.
Expanding this doesn't reproduce the trinomial; its root isn't a solution.

explanation: x² + 2x − 48 factors as (x − -8)(x − 6); the roots are -8 and 6, so (x − -8) is a factor.
